'''Feltran''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] officer who served [[Bria Tharen]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
In [[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]], he accompanied Tharen aboard the ''[[Queen of Empire]]'' which was traveling to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]] to meet up with the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutts]]. He was [[Death|killed]] by [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] while defending Tharen.

==Appearances==
*''[[Rebel Dawn]]'' {{1st}}
